title: HP-F9 Bioinformatical Analysis of Large-scale Data in Modern Genomics (Lab and Seminar) (Practical Course/Computer Lab with Student Seminars; Major Cancer Biology @ DKFZ)
further_info: HP-F9: Bioinformatical Analysis of Large-scale Data in Modern Genomics Type: Computer Lab with Student Seminars Date: 13 April – 22 May 2026 Locations: Various seminar rooms of DKFZ Main and Doku Buildings and Mathematikon Hosts/Supervisors: Benedikt Brors (responsible organizer and part 2), Anand Mayakonda Thippeswamy (part 1), Cihan Erkut (part 3)
